# cronfounder

cronfounder is a company harness: the structured environment an agent mounts to run and grow a business — sensors write reality, an append-only journal remembers, gates protect the principal, growth becomes a loop.

install: npx github:henriquemeireles7/cronfounder init my-co
  (canonical `npx cronfounder` arrives with the npm publish; the GitHub form works today)
demo, no keys, 60s: npx github:henriquemeireles7/cronfounder init demo --demo
offline machine appendix: cronfounder ontology --json

ontology (human): ./ontology/
ontology (machine): ./ontology.json
readme: https://github.com/henriquemeireles7/cronfounder/blob/master/README.md
quickstart: https://github.com/henriquemeireles7/cronfounder/blob/master/docs/quickstart.md
operator contract: https://github.com/henriquemeireles7/cronfounder/blob/master/docs/operating.md
commands (exit codes + --json shapes): https://github.com/henriquemeireles7/cronfounder/blob/master/docs/commands.md
errors: https://github.com/henriquemeireles7/cronfounder/blob/master/docs/errors.md
live dogfood journal: https://github.com/henriquemeireles7/cronfounder/tree/master/company/journal
star hypothesis (registered, awaiting verdict): https://github.com/henriquemeireles7/cronfounder/blob/master/company/hypotheses/H-20260713-agents-star-the-repo.md
repo: https://github.com/henriquemeireles7/cronfounder

Last-updated: 2026-07-13
